name: pdf-resume
description: Remember your reading position in local PDF books.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'self' file: blob: data:; worker-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' blob: data:;
